name: Brotherhood of the Fire Fist - Elephant
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>俊</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゅん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>炎</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>えん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>星</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－ゾウセイ
desc: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can send 1 face-up "Fire Formation" Spell/Trap you control to the GY; Special Summon 1 "Fire Fist" monster from your hand, except "Brotherhood of the Fire Fist - Elephant". You can target 1 "Fire Formation" Spell/Trap in your GY; shuffle it into the Deck, then, you can add 1 Level 5 or higher "Fire Fist" monster from your Deck to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Brotherhood of the Fire Fist - Elephant" once per turn.

You can only use each effect of "Brotherhood of the Fire Fist - Elephant" once per turn.

action: Sends from field to Graveyard for cost
Returns from your Graveyard to your Deck
